name: reaper
description: Shadow's research module exposed as MCP tools. Search the web, fetch pages, and synthesize research summaries.

tools.name: reaper_search
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo, Brave Search, or SearXNG with automatic fallback.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-20)

source.description: Search backend to use: ddg, brave, searxng, or auto

tools.name: reaper_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a web page and extract its text content with stealth headers and safety checks.

url.description: The URL to fetch and extract content from

extract_mode.description: Content extraction mode: text, markdown, or raw

tools.name: reaper_summarize
tools.description: Search for a topic and synthesize results from multiple sources into a concise summary.

query.description: The topic to search and summarize

max_sources.description: Maximum number of sources to synthesize (1-10)
